name: Black Knight Mortgage Technology REST API
what_it_does: Black Knight (now ICE Mortgage Technology) mortgage data and analytics REST API for lenders, servicers, investors, and real estate professionals to access property data, automated valuation models (AVM), mortgage performance analytics, origination data, and housing market intelligence — enabling automated property valuation, loan portfolio monitoring, housing market analysis, and mortgage workflow integration through the industry's leading mortgage data and analytics platform. Enables AI agents to manage property data for real estate asset and ownership data automation, handle AVM for automated property value estimation automation, access mortgage analytics for loan performance and delinquency analysis automation, retrieve market data for housing market trend and pricing automation, manage lien data for property lien and encumbrance automation, handle flood and hazard data for property risk assessment automation, access servicing data for loan payment history and borrower account automation, retrieve origination data for mortgage pipeline and funding analytics automation, manage MERS for mortgage electronic registration system lookup automation, and integrate Black Knight with LOS, servicing, and capital markets systems for mortgage workflow automation.
use_cases: Automating property valuation with AVM for mortgage origination and refinance automation agents
Monitoring loan portfolio performance and delinquency risk for servicer automation agents
Accessing property and housing market data for real estate investment analysis automation agents
Integrating mortgage data with origination and servicing workflows for lender automation agents
not_for: Consumer property search (Black Knight/ICE data is B2B for lenders and professionals, not consumer portals)
Commercial real estate analytics (Black Knight focuses on residential mortgage market)
Real-time trading data (Black Knight is mortgage analytics, not securities or capital markets feeds)
best_when: A mortgage lender, servicer, investor, or real estate professional wanting AI agents to access authoritative property data, automated valuations, mortgage analytics, and housing market intelligence through Black Knight's (ICE Mortgage Technology) comprehensive mortgage data platform.
avoid_when: ENTERPRISE LICENSING REQUIRED: Black Knight/ICE data requires enterprise data licensing; automated open-data assumption creates licensing_required; automated must obtain appropriate ICE Mortgage Technology data license. DATA USAGE RESTRICTIONS APPLY: Black Knight data has specific permitted uses per licensing agreement; automated unrestricted-use assumption creates licensing_violation for uses outside agreement scope; automated must comply with data licensing terms. AVM ACCURACY VARIES BY MARKET: AVM confidence scores vary by data density and property type; automated high-confidence assumption creates valuation_error for rural or unusual property types; automated must use AVM confidence intervals appropriately. MERS DATA HAS ACCESS REQUIREMENTS: Mortgage Electronic Registration data has specific access requirements; automated open-MERS assumption creates access_restriction for parties without MERS membership; automated must have MERS member access for registration data.

auth.notes: Black Knight (ICE Mortgage Technology) uses OAuth2 + API key for mortgage data REST API. REST API with JSON. Jacksonville, FL HQ (Black Knight legacy). Acquired by Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) in 2023 ($13.1B). Products: Empower LOS, MSP Servicing, McDash (analytics), PropertyPoint (AVM), Collateral Analytics, HeavenlyGreens. Processes data for 75% of US mortgages. Competes with CoreLogic, ATTOM, and Fannie/Freddie for mortgage data.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Trial for qualified mortgage professionals; production requires ICE licensing agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual data licensing by product and volume; API access included with data subscription; enterprise custom pricing
pricing.notes: Jacksonville FL (legacy). ICE subsidiary. Annual licensing. 75% of US mortgage data. Largest mortgage tech platform.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; AVM and property data APIs throttled per data license

known_agent_gotchas: PRODUCT APIs ARE SEPARATE: Black Knight/ICE has many separate product APIs (AVM, servicing analytics, LOS); automated unified assumption creates wrong_endpoint for calling across product lines; automated must use correct product-specific API and credentials

FCRA COMPLIANCE FOR CREDIT DATA: Accessing certain mortgage data triggers FCRA obligations; automated unconstrained data use assumption creates regulatory_exposure for FCRA-restricted data; automated must implement FCRA-compliant data access procedures

AVM IS ESTIMATE ONLY: AVM values are model estimates, not appraisals; automated appraisal-quality assumption creates overconfidence in AVM accuracy for high-stakes lending decisions; automated must communicate AVM estimate nature and confidence ranges

DATA VINTAGE MATTERS: Black Knight property data has varying recency depending on county recording; automated current-data assumption creates stale_information for counties with delayed recording; automated must check data as-of date for property records

ICE TRANSITION CREATES API CHANGES: Post-acquisition ICE is consolidating Black Knight APIs; automated stable-endpoints assumption creates deprecated_endpoint for APIs migrating to ICE platform; automated must monitor ICE migration communications
agent_readiness.security_notes: Mortgage data. SOC2, GLBA, FCRA. OAuth2. US only. Mortgage, property, and borrower financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage data. SOC2, GLBA, FCRA. OAuth2. US. Mortgage origination and servicing data.
